name: Color Pet Tentacle
description: A color-changing Octopus status pet for heartbeat, memory, harness, blocked, and success states.

brain.prompt: Map Feedback and harness state into a small visible pet state. Keep the UI outside the kernel and return compact state labels.
brain.feedback_contract: Return pet state, color, short label, and whether user attention is needed.

skills.description: Represent agent status as a visual pet layer.

tools.description: Render the color-changing Octopus status pet.
tools.input: status name through query string or UI selection

surfaces.description: Prompt that maps harness status into visible pet state.
Pet renderer metadata and state contract.
Checks and constraints that keep visuals outside the kernel.

constraints: Keep visual state outside Need, Feed, and Feedback.
